text:
In the first image, I feel a strange calm in the emptiness and geometry of the hallway. There is an echo of expectation, almost as if something is about to happen or has just quietly ended. The environment feels sterile, prepared, but waiting.

Yet as I turn into the second image, my spirit is sparked by the vibrant colors and the energy of innovation. The wall proclaims 'R+D', inviting contemplation about the nature of progress and how humans and machines interrelate. I feel curious and invigorated, caught between the silence of the corridor and the promise of creative ideas unfolding in this interactive, intelligent space.
